Video.summary: After a drunk reveller falls 20 metres off a cliff, lifeguards can’t believe the state he’s in.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lifeguards conduct an experiment, attempting to combat the lack of beachgoers reading dangerous current signs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 09

Video.summary: A car crashes on to Bondi Beach. Taco flips the jetski, ruining his plans to impress Hoppo before he leaves.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 06

Video.summary: A man breaks his leg, Maxi uses a tracking device to locate a thief and a bunch of school kids run wild.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 12

Video.summary: The biggest mass rescue in years sees Bondi Beach closed. Nicola joins the team and leads a mass rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 02

Video.summary: A Japanese tourist drowns just metres from lifeguards trying to save him. Beardy races to 2 Nepalese men.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 01

Video.summary: Jesse fractures his spine and Jake rescues a beginner surfer being smashed against cliffs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 13

Video.summary: Mouse accidentally turns off his radio, putting lives at risk. The shark alarm is set off.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 06

Video.summary: A miscommunication between lifeguards on the radio could cause serious problems in the water.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 09

Video.summary: Singlets returns to work, Pierre from Hong Kong meets the lifeguards and Hoppo teaches kids rip safety.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 13

Video.summary: Lifeguards face frustrating distractions involving lost gear, wayward children, ball games, and somersaults
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 06

Video.summary: Lifeguards sound the shark alarm. Young lifeguard Jake must retrieve a dead body
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 10

Video.summary: The lifeguards take the beach buggy into the streets, chasing down an aggressive beachgoer wielding a knife.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 02

Video.summary: A man assaults women in the surf. Lifeguards take part in a 30 day fitness and diet challenge.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 12

Video.summary: Lfeguards treat an anaphylactic shock patient for the first time and perform a surprising Christmas rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards play a final prank on Harrison. Nicola faces her fear of open water when a boat sinks off Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 13

Video.summary: A New Years Eve beach event with hundreds of participants leads the group directly into a rip.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 04

Video.summary: New trainee Tommy volunteers to catch a sea snake. Jesse clears the water to save an unresponsive man.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 02

Video.summary: Lifeguards assist a concussed boy who suffered a seizure, and a woman hit by a car. Karlie Kloss visits Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 05

Video.summary: Family members watch as lifeguards attempt to resuscitate two people from the same family.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 12

Video.summary: The lifeguards deal with drowning boogie boarders. Jesse gets a buoy rope stuck in the jetski intake.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 07

Video.summary: New team members are thrown in the deep end. Boo and Lachie embark on a mass rescue.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 03

Video.summary: Bondi local body builder Dimitri breaks both legs falling down a cliff. A paddleboarder snaps her collar bone.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 08

Video.summary: Borders open, tourists flood Bondi. Chase explores a shark colony with a local diver.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 06

Video.summary: Kite surfers visit a stormy Bondi. Chappo and Jack aid victim of chest pain, Harries confronts a body surfer.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 10

Video.summary: After a mass rescue, lifeguards search for a student who didn't make it back to the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 09

Video.summary: After 2 years Bondi has reopened and the lifeguards manage 30,010 beachgoers.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 01

Video.summary: A young local suffers a serious skating accident. Festive spirit turns deadly with alcohol affected swimmers.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 05

Video.summary: A man is dragged unconscious from the water, no pulse and not breathing. Reidy and Beardy begin resuscitation.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 06

Video.summary: Cyclonic swell hits Bondi Beach with 12-foot waves. H lectures drunken youths. New drone technology is tested.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 10

Video.summary: A local surf photographer aids in saving a tourist. 'Jewellery Rescue' search for a missing wedding ring.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 04

Video.summary: A Bondi local is found face down, unresponsive in the sand. Singlets is flocked by seagulls in the buggy.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 05

Video.summary: A 2 year old girl is trapped in a locked car. Lifeguards chase a bag thief. Swimmers go under after hours.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 08

Video.summary: Maxi responds to a tunnel fire. Harrison and Jethro attend to a girl found facedown with no pulse.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 12

Video.summary: Maxi risks his life to rescue two fishermen. Jethro rescues tourists from rips, then collapses on the beach.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 10

Video.summary: The Hare Krishnas visit Bondi. Maxi plays a Christmas prank. A scuba diver drowns at Ben Buckler.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 03

Video.summary: An American tourist needs CPR after being pulled unconscious from the ocean in calm waters.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 01

Video.summary: Maxi juggles both lifeguarding and firefighting, as the other lifeguards face rescues with language barriers.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 02

Video.summary: A lighting strike survival. A young spinal patient hits Singlets too close to home. Gavin bogs the buggy.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 08

Video.summary: New Year's festivities turn dark with a teenage drug overdose and mass rescues.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 04

Video.summary: Hoppo shows newbies how to perform a mass-rescue single handedly. Trainee Burkey faces his first drowning.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 01

Video.summary: Two men start drowning at the north end. Lifeguards prepare for the annual lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 06

Video.summary: Swimmer in trouble refuses rescue. Faddy deals with a motionless man. Reidy and Corey assist two drunk girls.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 10
